meta.program: US Section 301 (China technology-transfer action) additional duties, China-origin goods
meta.as_of: Rates in force July 2026. Primary snapshot: USITC HTS 2026 Revision 11 current release; USITC "China Tariffs" consolidated table last updated 2026-02-25.
sources: https://hts.usitc.gov/reststop/file?release=currentRelease&filename=China+Tariffs (USITC consolidated Section 301 China table, last updated 2026-02-25; PRIMARY source of rates_by_hts8)
https://hts.usitc.gov/reststop/exportList?from=0101&to=9999&format=JSON (USITC HTS current release JSON export; per-line 9903.88/9903.91 footnotes; cross-check source 1)
https://hts.usitc.gov/reststop/file?release=currentRelease&filename=Chapter%2099 (HTS Chapter 99, U.S. notes 20 and 31 to subchapter III, enumerations parsed from PDF; cross-check source 2)
https://ustr.gov/sites/default/files/enforcement/301Investigations/Notice_of_Modification_(List_4A_and_List_4B).pdf (84 FR 43304, List 4A Annex A / List 4B Annex C)
89 FR 101682 (Dec 2024: tungsten, polysilicon, wafers increases eff. 2025-01-01; cited in HTS note 31 compiler notes)
90 FR 48320 and 90 FR 50947 (suspension of maritime/cargo-handling headings 9903.91.12/9903.91.14 until 2026-11-10; cited in USITC China Tariffs file)
meta.coverage: Full line-level coverage of Section 301 Lists 1, 2, 3, 4A plus all four-year-review (U.S. note 31) rate increases in force as of July 2026, at 8-digit HTS subheading granularity: 10,391 subheadings in rates_by_hts8, taken verbatim from the USITC "China Tariffs" consolidated table (2026-02-25) and cross-verified with zero mismatches against (a) per-line 9903 footnotes in the USITC HTS JSON export and (b) the subheading enumerations of U.S. notes 20 and 31 to subchapter III of chapter 99 parsed from the Chapter 99 PDF. 15 additional subheadings with statistical-level-only (partial) coverage are in partial_stat_level, not asserted as full-subheading rates (except 84261900 and 04032050, see caveats).
caveats: Section 301 duties only. China-origin goods typically also owe IEEPA duties (e.g., 9903.01.20/9903.01.24), reciprocal-tariff duties, Section 232, AD/CVD, and normal MFN duty. Total duty is NOT just this rate.

Keys are 8-digit HTS subheadings (digits only). Some note 31 (four-year-review) coverage and all active exclusions are defined at the 10-digit statistical level or by product description; see partial_stat_level and exclusions.json.

List 4B (9903.88.16, 15%) was suspended indefinitely on 2019-12-15 and remains suspended: goods on it (e.g., smartphones 8517.13.00, laptops 8471.30.01) carry NO Section 301 duty and are absent from rates_by_hts8.
Expired provisions correctly excluded: 9903.91.04 (facemasks 25%, 2025 only; replaced by 9903.91.07 at 50% from 2026-01-01) and 9903.91.10 (enteral-syringe exemption, ended 2026-01-01).
Product exclusions under 9903.88.69 (note 20(vvv)) and 9903.88.70 (note 20(www)) are IN EFFECT through 2026-11-09 and can zero the Section 301 duty for described products; see exclusions.json.

Upcoming (NOT in these rates): headings 9903.91.12-9903.91.16 (intermodal chassis; ship-to-shore cranes +100%) take effect 2026-11-10 (90 FR 48320, 90 FR 50947); the 9903.91.05 semiconductor rate is scheduled to increase on 2027-06-23 (note 31(f)(ii)).
84261900 is listed at 25% per the USITC table, but 9903.92.10 covers only ship-to-shore gantry cranes; other goods of 8426.19.00 owe no additional duty (9903.92.80) - see partial_stat_level.

04032050 appears in the USITC China Tariffs table and note 20(s) (List 4A) but the current HTS line 0403.20.50 carries no 9903 footnote; included at 7.5% on the strength of the note/table (footnote appears to be a USITC annotation gap).
8507.60.00 (lithium-ion batteries): 25% under 9903.91.06 from 2026-01-01 (was 7.5% List 4A, and 25% for EV batteries from 2024-09-27).
Chapter 98 provisions (9802.00.40/.50/.60/.80 repairs/assembly) interact with Lists 1-3 per notes 20(b)/(d)/(g) but are not product subheadings and are omitted.
Rates apply to China-origin goods only (country of origin under CBP substantial-transformation rules, not country of export).

spot_checks.src1: No 9903 footnote in HTS; absent from China Tariffs table
spot_checks.src2: USTR 84 FR 43304 Annex C (List 4B) contains 8517.12.00; 4B suspended 84 FR 69447

spot_checks.src1: Absent from China Tariffs table and note 20(s); present in note 20(u)

spot_checks.src2: USTR Annex A (9617.00.40); CBP guidance video on beverage containers

spot_checks.src1: Absent from China Tariffs; in note 20(u)
Absent from China Tariffs; note 20(u) contains 7323.93.00; no HTS footnote

spot_checks.src2: USTR press release (non-EV lithium-ion 25% in 2026; EV batteries 25% in 2024)

list4b.note: SUSPENDED indefinitely since 2019-12-15 (84 FR 69447); no duty in force

fyr_steel_aluminum_and_other_25.note: Four-year review, U.S. note 31(b): steel/aluminum products, EV batteries and parts, critical minerals, facemasks (some stat-level), etc.

fyr_semiconductors_polysilicon_wafers_50.note: U.S. note 31(f): semiconductors (8541.xx, 8542.xx), polysilicon 2804.61.00, wafers 3818.00.00; further increase scheduled 2027-06-23

fyr_graphite_magnets_liion_batteries_25.note: U.S. note 31(g): natural graphite 2504.xx, permanent magnets 8505.11.00, lithium-ion batteries 8507.60.00

fyr_respirators_facemasks_50.note: U.S. note 31(h): 10-digit stat lines of 6307.90.98 only (partial coverage)

sts_gantry_cranes_25.note: Ship-to-shore gantry cranes of 8426.19.00 only; 9903.91.09 contract carve-out; rises to 100% (9903.91.14) on 2026-11-10

29319090.note: Coverage limited to specific 10-digit statistical lines or product descriptions in U.S. notes 20/31, Ch.99 subch. III; not the whole 8-digit subheading. Verify at 10-digit level.

49019900.note: Coverage limited to specific 10-digit statistical lines or product descriptions in U.S. notes 20/31, Ch.99 subch. III; not the whole 8-digit subheading. Verify at 10-digit level.

63079098.note: Textile respirators/facemasks (stat lines 6307.90.9842/.9844/.9850/.9870/.9875) pay +50% under 9903.91.07 (note 31(h), eff. 2026-01-01); other goods of 6307.90.98 covered only per described subsets of notes 20(s)/31(b). Verify at 10-digit level.

84261900.note: Included in rates_by_hts8 at 25% per USITC China Tariffs table, but heading 9903.92.10 covers only ship-to-shore gantry cranes; other cranes of 8426.19.00 enter under 9903.92.80 with no additional duty, and 9903.91.09 exempts cranes under pre-2024-05-14 contracts (entered before 2026-05-14).

85176200.description: Machines for the reception, conversion and transmission or regeneration of voice, images or other data, including switch
